criteria.label: Fit a 2D UMAP embedding with umap-learn using n_neighbors and min_dist explicitly set.
criteria.example: On a scaled Iris matrix, run umap.UMAP(n_components=2, n_neighbors=30, min_dist=0.1, random_state=42).fit_transform(X_scaled) and report shape (150, 2).

criteria.label: Explain how n_neighbors trades local detail against global layout in UMAP.
criteria.example: Compare n_neighbors=10 vs 100 on the same scaled dataset and describe whether micro-clusters or overall branch connectivity improved for your goal.

criteria.label: Explain what min_dist changes and what it leaves unchanged in the UMAP pipeline.
criteria.example: State that min_dist=0.0 vs 0.5 alters cluster tightness in 2D but the high-D k-NN sets at fixed n_neighbors stay the same before optimization.

criteria.label: Contrast UMAP with PCA and t-SNE without re-deriving their internals.
criteria.example: On one scaled matrix, produce PCA(2), UMAP(2), and note which shows linear variance axes, which emphasizes local islands (t-SNE), and which balances global continuity (UMAP).

criteria.label: Apply preprocessing and reproducibility hygiene before sharing a UMAP figure.
criteria.example: Document StandardScaler → UMAP(n_neighbors=30, min_dist=0.1, metric='euclidean', random_state=42) and pin umap-learn version in a notebook header.
